[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cartoon-style illustration shows a smiling light-haired girl leaning forward with a speech bubble, set against a simple light background with another character’s silhouette and the large text “GERAMNYA AKU” plus an emoji.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a drawn, anime-like girl with light-colored hair, a wide open smile, eyes drawn in a squint, and a playful pose leaning forward. She wears a white outfit, including a white top and a white cloth-like accessory around her head area, and her hands are extended outward near the right side of the image. A smaller, darker silhouette figure appears in the background to the right of her hair and arms.

Setting:
The scene is a flat, light-colored background without a clear real-world location, suggesting a simple comic or meme-style panel.

Visual Details:
The girl has long, pale hair with a ribbon-like shape near the top and a few darker highlights in the strands. Her expression is exaggerated with curved mouth lines forming a big grin and closed, slanted eyes. A speech bubble near the upper right contains several red exclamation marks to indicate emphasis. The right side shows lines and shading suggesting action or impact, with small dark marks near the raised hand area. The camera angle appears to be straight-on, with the girl centered-left and the text dominating the bottom portion of the frame.

Visible Text:
GERAMNYA AKU
(There is also a yellow face emoji showing a grimacing/squinting expression, with no other readable text.)

Practical Summary:
The image is a stylized anime-like cartoon of a smiling girl with exclamation marks in a speech bubble and motion lines. Large bottom text reads “GERAMNYA AKU” alongside a yellow emoji face.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
